steps.title: Factor the denominator as a perfect square
Solve for x + 5
steps.content: Let u = x + 5. Then 1/u² = 4, so u² = 1/4, giving u = ±1/2.

steps.title: Identify the possible value
steps.content: x + 5 = 1/2 or x + 5 = -1/2. The value 1/2 appears among the choices.

steps.title: Evaluate all four choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — '1/2': x + 5 = 1/2 ⇒ (1/2)² = 1/4 ⇒ 1/(1/4) = 4. ✓
  • Choice B — '5/2': (5/2)² = 25/4 ⇒ 1/(25/4) = 4/25 ≠ 4. ✗
  • Choice C — '9/2': (9/2)² = 81/4 ⇒ 1/(81/4) = 4/81 ≠ 4. ✗
  • Choice D — '11/2': (11/2)² = 121/4 ⇒ 1/(121/4) = 4/121 ≠ 4. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
